title: SLO Evaluation
description: Governed SLO evaluation artifact produced by BR. Evaluates artifact quality, timeliness, and traceability across BE, BF, and BG outputs and determines whether the system is allowed to proceed.

artifact_id.description: Unique identifier for this SLO evaluation artifact.

slo_status.description: Overall SLO status derived from all SLI measurements.

allowed_to_proceed.description: Whether downstream execution is allowed to proceed based on SLO status and error budget.

slis.description: Individual SLI measurements, each in range [0.0, 1.0].

completeness.description: Fraction of required BG sections present and populated, weighted by findings count.

timeliness.description: Measurement of timestamp-based currency. Defaults to 1.0 when not measurable.

traceability.description: Fraction of evidence items traceable back to BE/BF source artifacts.

traceability_integrity.description: Lineage integrity SLI — 1.0 when all artifact lineage chains are valid, 0.0 when any lineage error is detected.

lineage_valid.description: Whether the artifact lineage chain for this SLO evaluation has been validated without errors.

parent_artifact_ids.description: IDs of parent artifacts (decision and synthesis) that drove this SLO evaluation.

violations.description: List of SLI violations detected during evaluation.

error_budget.description: Error budget derived from SLI averages.

remaining.description: Remaining error budget as a fraction [0.0, 1.0]. Equal to mean(slis).

burn_rate.description: Error budget burn rate. Equal to 1 - remaining.

inputs.description: References to the BE, BF, and BG input artifacts consumed.

be_artifacts.description: Paths or identifiers of BE (normalized_run_result) artifacts consumed.

bf_artifact.description: Path or identifier of the BF (cross_run_intelligence_decision) artifact, or null if not provided.

bg_artifact.description: Path or identifier of the BG (working_paper_evidence_pack) artifact, or null if not provided.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 date-time when this artifact was generated.
